evals.query: index my python codebase so i can query it later
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked and runs scripts/index.py --full against the workspace, producing .kg/code_kg.sqlite and a summary JSON.

evals.query: build a code graph for this repo
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked and performs a full index build.

evals.query: set up semantic code search for the project (we have python + typescript)
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked with default settings (embeddings enabled) and indexes both languages.

evals.query: scan the workspace for symbols and classes and store them somewhere I can query
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked, runs a full index, and confirms the SQLite DB location.

evals.query: reindex files that changed since origin/main — i just merged a branch
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked with --changed-since origin/main.

evals.query: update the kg database for just the files I have staged
refresh the code graph but skip embeddings, no internet right now
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked with --no-embeddings and completes without downloading the fastembed model.

evals.query: i want to rebuild the .kg/code_kg.sqlite from scratch for this java service
evals.expected_output: The skill is invoked with --full (and likely --include-languages java).

evals.query: search the codebase for functions that handle auth
evals.expected_output: This is a query, not an index build. The code-graph-query skill should handle it; code-graph-indexer should NOT trigger.
This is a call-graph query; code-graph-query handles it, not the indexer.

evals.query: write a new python function that parses a yaml config
evals.expected_output: This is code authoring, unrelated to indexing. The indexer should not trigger.

evals.query: parse this typescript file manually and tell me what's wrong with it
evals.expected_output: Ad-hoc parse request, not a workspace-wide index. The indexer should not trigger.

evals.query: add sqlite-vec to my requirements.txt and write a query against it
evals.expected_output: Asking for coding help, not to run the indexer. Should not trigger.

evals.query: find all functions in this repo that don't have docstrings
evals.expected_output: This is a structural AST query; code-graph-query handles it. The indexer should not trigger unless the index doesn't exist yet — in that case the query skill will prompt the user to index first.
